title: nephrodium omeiense
intro: Nephrodium omeiense, a species of extinct ferns, is known to belong to the family Matoniaceae. It is primarily recognized for its potential medicinal properties, which are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is thought to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is required to confirm these findings. In terms of herbal preparations, Nephrodium omeiense is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically combined with other ingredients to create teas, infusions, or topical applications.
